name: FNB ETN on TESLAC SEP25
summary: FNB ETN on TESLAC SEP25 is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) issued by First National Bank (FNB) linked to the performance of Tesla shares with a maturity date in September 2025. The ETN provides investors with exposure to Tesla's stock without directly owning the shares, and it is traded on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange (JSE). It is based in South Africa.
